ENGAGEMENT LETTER — TIME AND MATERIALS

Date: March 1, 2026

To: Acme Corp
    123 Main Street
    San Francisco, CA 94105

From: Lighthouse Advisory LLC
      456 Consulting Ave, Suite 200
      New York, NY 10001

Re: Professional Services Engagement — Digital Transformation Advisory

Dear Mr. Johnson,

We are pleased to confirm the terms of our engagement with Acme Corp ("Client")
as follows:

SCOPE OF SERVICES
Lighthouse Advisory LLC ("Firm") will provide technology strategy and advisory
services related to the Client's digital transformation initiative, including:
- Current-state architecture assessment
- Technology roadmap development
- Vendor selection support
- Change management advisory

BILLING ARRANGEMENT: Time and Materials

RATE CARD:
- Principal Consultant: $250.00 per hour
- Senior Consultant: $175.00 per hour
- Analyst: $125.00 per hour

CURRENCY: USD

ENGAGEMENT PERIOD:
Start Date: April 1, 2026
End Date: September 30, 2026

PAYMENT TERMS: Net 30 from invoice date

ESTIMATED BUDGET: $150,000.00 (not a cap)

By signing below, both parties agree to the terms of this engagement.

Lighthouse Advisory LLC                 Acme Corp

____________________________            ____________________________
Name: Sarah Mitchell, Managing Partner  Name: Robert Johnson, CFO
Date: March 5, 2026                     Date: March 5, 2026
